SELECT ?orgLabel (COUNT(*) AS ?count) WHERE {
  wd:Q23215 p:P166 ?statement.
  ?statement ps:P166 ?award.
  ?award wdt:P4745 ?org.
  ?org rdfs:label ?orgLabel.
  ?statement pq:P585 ?time.
  ?award rdfs:label ?awardLabel.
  FILTER(LANG(?orgLabel) = 'en')
  FILTER(LANG(?awardLabel) = 'en')
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?awardLabel), 'female solo artist') OR CONTAINS(LCASE(?awardLabel), 'artist of the year'))

}
GROUP BY ?orgLabel
HAVING (COUNT(*) >= 2)
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 1
